name: Ingredion Inc
summary: Our Company Ingredion Incorporated (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, the Company, Ingredion, we, us, and our) is a leading global ingredient solutions provider that transforms grains, fruits, vegetables and other plant-based materials into value-added ingredient solutions for the food, beverage, animal nutrition, brewing and industrial markets.
